hero.title: Empowering Women, Protecting Nature, Transforming Communities
hero.subtitle: A grassroots movement from Melpakkam village reshaping rural Tamil Nadu, one life at a time.

home.intro_title: Of the people, of the soil, of the tradition
home.intro_text: Amudham Women Welfare Trust is a community-driven organization based in Melpakkam village. We work on women's self-reliance, children's education, rural development, herbal gardens and environmental protection.

women.title: Women Empowerment
women.desc: Training, livelihoods and self-help groups that make women self-reliant.

children.title: Children's Education
children.desc: Learning skills enhancement and protection of children's rights.

nature.title: Nature Protection
nature.desc: Herbal gardens, tree plantation and environmental awareness.

village.title: Village Development
village.desc: Health, skill development and sustainable livelihood programs.

home.join_text: Your small act can transform a woman's life. Join us today.

about.title: About Us
about.tag: From the heart of Melpakkam village
about.intro: Amudham Women Welfare Trust is a community organisation working in Villupuram district of Tamil Nadu. We work intensively on women's livelihoods, children's education and environmental protection.
about.vision: A rural Tamil Nadu where every woman lives with dignity and self-reliance, flourishing in harmony with nature.
about.mission: To strengthen women and communities through education, training, livelihood and environmental initiatives.
about.history: We began in 2010 as a small self-help collective with a handful of women in distress. Today, we reach hundreds of villages across the region.
about.address: Melpakkam Village, Tindivanam Taluk, Villupuram District, Tamil Nadu, India.

p1.title: Learning Skills Enhancement
p1.desc: Educational support, supplementary classes and digital learning for rural children.

p2.title: Village Herbal Garden Initiative
p2.desc: A herbal garden in every village to revive traditional medicine and biodiversity.

p3.title: Environment Protection
p3.desc: Tree plantation, anti-plastic awareness and water body conservation.

p4.title: Women Safety Program
p4.desc: Combating gender violence with legal counseling and survivor support.

p5.title: Women Economic Growth
p5.desc: Self-help groups, micro loans and entrepreneurship training.

s1.name: Revathi, 34
s1.quote: Thanks to Amudham's training, I now run my own tailoring shop and my children go to school.

s2.name: Aadhi, 12
s2.quote: The supplementary classes helped me top my school in maths. Grateful to Amudham teachers.

s3.name: Priya, 27
s3.quote: Working here is the most meaningful part of my life. Every woman becomes stronger.

s4.name: Murugan, 56
s4.quote: The herbal garden program changed the face of our village. Traditional medicine is alive again.
